# m-dev-tools (offline fixture)

> Trimmed copy used by test-discovery-protocol.py --offline. All URLs
> point at sibling fixture files via the file:// scheme so the offline
> path stays network-free. Mirrors only the data files (not the
> schemas, which the script reads from profile/ directly).

## Start here

- [Org catalog (machine-readable)](file://./tools.json): per-repo summary + pointer URLs
- [Task index (hand-curated routing)](file://./task_index.json): intent → typed ID

## Guardrails

- Do not invent STD* APIs or `m` subcommands.
